ddls:
CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "state_ut" TEXT /* State or Union Territory the municipality belongs to */,
  "ulb" TEXT /* Urban Local Body the municipality belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the municipality */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the municipality in square kilometers */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the municipality */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the municipality */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the municipality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the municipality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste collection method (e.g., Door-to-Door, Community Bins) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste collection method */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of collection (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Average capacity of collection vehicles in liters */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the collection method per unit of waste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_collection_data" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste collection record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the waste collection data belongs to */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste collection method used */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of households covered under waste collection */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the waste collection */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of waste collected in kilograms */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of waste collected (e.g., Organic, Non-Organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_collection_data_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_collection_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES waste_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_segregation_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste segregation practice */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the waste segregation practice (e.g., 2-bin system, 3-bin system) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the waste segregation practice */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Average capacity of storage facilities for each type of waste */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of the segregation practice per unit of waste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_segregation_data" (
  "segregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste segregation record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the waste segregation data belongs to */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste segregation practice used */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of households covered under waste segregation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the waste segregation */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of segregated waste in kilograms */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of waste segregated (e.g., Organic, Non-Organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_segregation_data_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_segregation_data_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES waste_segregation_practices ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the transportation vehicle (e.g., Tractor, TATA pickup vehicle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transportation vehicle */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the vehicle in liters or kilograms */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_data" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the transportation data belongs to */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transportation vehicle used */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of transportation (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transportation */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Total quantity of waste transported in kilograms */,
  "waste_type" TEXT /* Type of waste transported (e.g., Organic, Non-Organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES transportation_vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the household belongs to */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward the household is located in */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of households covered under door-to-door collection */,
  "household_type" TEXT /* Type of household (e.g., Single, Multi-family) */,
  "waste_generation" REAL /* Average waste generation per household in kilograms per month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_residential_areas" (
  "non_residential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-residential area */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the non-residential area belongs to */,
  "area" TEXT /* Name of the non-residential area */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Percentage of non-residential areas covered under door-to-door collection */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of non-residential area (e.g., Commercial, Industrial) */,
  "waste_generation" REAL /* Average waste generation in the non-residential area in kilograms per month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_residential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_residential_areas_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_depos" (
  "depot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage depot */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the municipality the storage depot belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the storage depot */,
  "segregation_facility" TEXT /* Type of segregation facility available (e.g., 2-bin, 3-bin) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Total capacity of the storage depot in kilograms */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_depos_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, official, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the user account is active (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., waste collection, waste segregation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Published) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., waste collection, waste segregation) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data included in the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Database, Manual Input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report generated, data updated) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
